title: Name Tags Always
body:
Mobs that have had a name tag used on them, now have their names always displayed. I personally found that needing to look directly at the mob to see their name to be annoying. Naming my pet bats in particular felt quite useless, so I made this mod to fix that! Lastly, 'always' is a bit inaccurate, as there is now a config option and keybind to toggle this feature on and off. Enjoy! 

### Config
- **Display Names Enabled:** Determines if names are always displayed. Can be toggled via keybind
- **Send Toggle Notifications:**. Determines if you are messaged when pressing the toggle keybind 
### Keybind
- **Toggle Display Names:** Toggles display names on and off. Unbound by default

Derived from: [Name Tag Enabler](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/name-tag-enabler)
